hypothesis: If pretrained equivariant ML surrogates (eqV2 or eSEN) are used to pre-converge NEB pathways and then restarted with DFT SSNEB, then the number of expensive VASP SSNEB iterations and total computational time will be substantially reduced while producing minimum-energy pathways and transition-state energies for CsPbI3 phase transitions and the TiO2-B→anatase transformation that agree with pure VASP results within DFT accuracy.
